description: DIRECTION template, not detected directly - only reached via `extends` (nest). Node/TypeScript backend language intelligence, shared regardless of framework.

plugins.description: TypeScript/JavaScript language server for enhanced code intelligence (same plugin as the frontend direction - NestJS is TS too).

_notes: Databases/queues deliberately NOT declared here as marketplace plugins: no generic Postgres/MySQL/MongoDB/RabbitMQ/Kafka plugin exists in anthropics/claude-plugins-official (verified directly against the repo's plugin+external_plugins directory listing). These are better served by MCP SERVERS - a different config surface from enabledPlugins - see sql.json's _notes for the specific free/self-hosted-friendly options (Postgres, Redis, RabbitMQ, Kafka).
